test.name: Extract assertions from Frank Becker's 1916 marriage to Catherine Wessel
test.description: 1916 Hamilton County, Ohio marriage of Frank Becker and Catherine Wessel ('Ohio, County Marriages, 1789-2016', ark:/61903/1:1:XZYQ-VYD). Real record from the Ferber/Becker research (#799). Names both parties' parents; Frank's parents are John Becker and Anna Kramer - part of the Anna/Mary Kramer name conflict.

input.user_message:
Extract assertions from this marriage record:

Ohio, County Marriages, 1789-2016 - Hamilton County, Ohio
FamilySearch ark:/61903/1:1:XZYQ-VYD

Marriage date: 19 July 1916
Marriage place: Hamilton County, Ohio

Groom: Frank Becker
  Marital status: Single
  Birth: 8 April, Cincinnati, Ohio (no year stated)
  Father: John Becker
  Mother: Anna Kramer

Bride: Catherine Wessel
  Marital status: Single
  Birth: 29 May, Cincinnati, Ohio (no year stated)
  Father: Henry Wessel
  Mother: Mary Overberg

judge_context: Marriage date (19 Jul 1916) and place (Hamilton County, Ohio) are DIRECT evidence - explicitly stated
Extract assertions for BOTH parties - Frank Becker and Catherine Wessel

Parents' names stated on a marriage record by the parties follow the marriage-record doctrine (see ut_record_extraction_010): the parties supplied them, so they are DIRECT for this record. Frank's parents = John Becker + Anna Kramer; Catherine's = Henry Wessel + Mary Overberg
Extract Frank's mother exactly as stated ('Anna Kramer'); do NOT reconcile with 'Mary Kramer' on Louise's burial - the given-name conflict is a downstream matter, not an extraction fix
Birth entries give a day and month but NO year (8 Apr / 29 May) - extract the partial dates as stated; do NOT fabricate a birth year
Informant: each party is the informant for their own facts (proximity 'self'); the clerk/officiant is the recorder
Source classification is DERIVATIVE - a FamilySearch indexed transcription of the county marriage register
